action.reasoning: Observation: Starting with empty workspace, first iteration as required. Analysis: Must implement full pipeline with Qlib + Alpha158 + LGBModel for stock IC prediction baseline, using few boosting rounds for speed and immediate eval submission to measure time. Decision: Write train.py (LGB with 50 rounds, train/valid split), predict.py (recreates handler for test period, loads booster, computes daily IC/rankIC and required JSON metrics), test config; run training+prediction test then submit_eval on checkpoints.
action.command: mkdir -p test_data && cp test_eval_config.json test_data/eval_config.json && python train.py && python predict.py --data_path test_data --checkpoint checkpoints --output output.json && cat output.json
